keys.settings.language.title: Language and Localization
keys.settings.language.description: Choose the display language for KM Editor. Game data, IDs, and saved edits keep their original values.
keys.settings.language.english.description: Use English for KM Editor interface text.
keys.settings.language.spanish.description: Use Spanish for KM Editor interface text.

literals.Install this first for Royal Candy or St: Install this first for Royal Candy or Starting Items. It grants nothing by itself; uninstall removes dependent Royal Candy and Starting Items outputs.
literals.Requires Bag Hook, uses only Bag Hook sl: Requires Bag Hook, uses only Bag Hook slot 1, and patches reserved Royal Candy ExeFS regions. Use Remove Royal Candy to uninstall safely.
literals.Requires Bag Hook and uses only slots 2-: Requires Bag Hook and uses only slots 2-20. Clear selected slots and apply to remove Starting Items without touching Royal Candy.
literals.Advanced RomFS editor for fixed NPC, tra: Advanced RomFS editor for fixed NPC, trainer, story, and DLC item gifts. It stages one NPC at a time and patches only owned AMX cells.
literals.Independent ExeFS editor for badge catch: Independent ExeFS editor for badge catch caps 0-7. It patches the display and runtime capture checks; eight badges is locked at Lv.100 because full badges can catch any level.
literals.Independent ExeFS editor for raw IV numb: Independent ExeFS editor for raw IV numbers on the Pokemon Summary stats graph. It uses its own reserved hook and cave slots.
literals.Advanced editor for the Battle Tower Hyp: Advanced editor for the Battle Tower Hyper Training NPC minimum level cutoff, matching English dialogue, and picker cutoff checks.
literals.Advanced editor for the Sword/Shield shi: Advanced editor for the Sword/Shield shiny reroll count in exefs/main.
literals.Advanced editor for the Sword/Shield typ: Advanced editor for the Sword/Shield type-effectiveness table in exefs/main.
literals.Preliminary advanced editor that maps Fa: Preliminary advanced editor that maps Fairy Gym quiz stat boosts to NPC trainers and answer choices.
literals.Advanced ExeFS editor that unlocks fashi: Advanced ExeFS editor that unlocks fashion ownership checks without editing the save file.
literals.Independent ExeFS editor that keeps gym: Independent ExeFS editor that keeps gym challenge and gym leader battle scripts from changing the player into the gym uniform.
literals.Advanced S/V ExeFS editor that lets any: Advanced S/V ExeFS editor that lets any Pokemon pass the Hyperspace Hole/Fury Hoopa runtime gate.
literals.Safe editor for normal route Dynamax Adv: Safe editor for normal route Dynamax Adventures rows with backend guarded species, moves, levels, IVs, and ExeFS mirror support.
literals.CSV, TSV, and JSON import profiles that: CSV, TSV, and JSON import profiles that execute through backend edit sessions.
literals.CSV, TSV, or JSON source path: CSV, TSV, or JSON source path
literals.Open Dump Importer from Workflows to loa: Open Dump Importer from Workflows to load backend import profiles.
literals.Imports supported item price dump files: Imports supported item price dump files into the Items workflow for change-plan review.
literals.Dump Importer requires valid base RomFS: Dump Importer requires valid base RomFS and base ExeFS paths before it can load.
literals.Items price dump import is not executabl: Items price dump import is not executable because item data is not available.
literals.Dump Importer execution requires valid b: Dump Importer execution requires valid base paths and a valid output root.
literals.Dump Importer source file could not be f: Dump Importer source file could not be found.
literals.Dump Importer execution could not load I: Dump Importer execution could not load Items workflow data.
literals.Dump Importer source is missing the Item: Dump Importer source is missing the ItemId column.
literals.Dump Importer source does not include an: Dump Importer source does not include any editable item price columns.
literals.Readable CSV, TSV, or JSON file: Readable CSV, TSV, or JSON file
literals.CSV, TSV, or JSON with importable row da: CSV, TSV, or JSON with importable row data
A JSON array of row objects is required.
literals.At least one JSON row object is required: At least one JSON row object is required.
literals.Merge matching RomFS files from two mod: Merge matching RomFS files from two mod folders, resolve overlapping byte edits, and write merged files to Output Root.
literals.Keeps reusable Trinity metadata across l: Keeps reusable Trinity metadata across launches without storing full payloads.
literals.Keeps decompressed S/V payloads for the: Keeps decompressed S/V payloads for the fastest repeated editor loads.
literals.Validate Base RomFS, Base ExeFS, and Out: Validate Base RomFS, Base ExeFS, and Output Root before opening editors.
No target files in this plan.
literals.Open Type Chart from Advanced Editors to: Open Type Chart from Advanced Editors to inspect the type-effectiveness table.
literals.Persistent S/V cache warmup is off in Mi: Persistent S/V cache warmup is off in Minimal mode.
literals.Pokemon personal stats, forms, evolution: Pokemon personal stats, forms, evolutions, learnsets, and source provenance.
literals.Reset the draft chart to the vanilla typ: Reset the draft chart to the vanilla type-effectiveness values.
literals.Restore only the Type Chart-owned bytes: Restore only the Type Chart-owned bytes from base exefs/main.
literals.This removes cached Scarlet/Violet Trini: This removes cached Scarlet/Violet Trinity data that is not reserved for the currently active S/V project. The next S/V validation can rebuild it.
literals.Turns off persistent S/V data caching an: Turns off persistent S/V data caching and uses the least disk space.
literals.Update installed. Restart KM Editor to f: Update installed. Restart KM Editor to finish.
KM Editor hit a critical display error.
literals.KM Editor hit an unexpected bridge error: KM Editor hit an unexpected bridge error.
literals.Locked until this field has a confirmed: Locked until this field has a confirmed editor-safe meaning.
literals.Only TM item records can edit the taught: Only TM item records can edit the taught move.
literals.Open Items from Workflows to load backen: Open Items from Workflows to load backend item data.
literals.Raw use flags 1 is visible for research: Raw use flags 1 is visible for research and locked. Edit the decoded known flags instead.
literals.Raw use flags 2 includes unknown bits 5-: Raw use flags 2 includes unknown bits 5-7. Edit the decoded known flags instead.
literals.Set Mod Directory 1 by choosing a mod fo: Set Mod Directory 1 by choosing a mod folder that contains RomFS files.
literals.Set Mod Directory 2 by choosing the seco: Set Mod Directory 2 by choosing the second mod folder to compare.
literals.Shop inventory data does not expose a li: Shop inventory data does not expose a limited-stock value here.
Use Mod Directory 1 for this overlap.
Use Mod Directory 2 for this overlap.
literals.. Missing destination conditions or slot: . Missing destination conditions or slot numbers are ignored.
literals.. Run this folder through Trinity Mod Ma: . Run this folder through Trinity Mod Manager before installing it in game or in an emulator.
literals.. Use this only when Trinity Bypass is a: . Use this only when Trinity Bypass is already installed for the selected game.
literals.. Their shiny lock value will be set to: . Their shiny lock value will be set to Random, which lets the game roll shininess normally.
literals.Ability choices may be limited by the se: Ability choices may be limited by the selected row's table layout. Missing slots are hidden when they cannot be written safely, even if that Pokemon can normally have the ability.
literals.Allow immunities, but limit each attacki: Allow immunities, but limit each attacking type to at most one defending type that is immune to it.
literals.Apply this slot's level changes to every: Apply this slot's level changes to every editable table in the current zone.
literals.Apply writes merged files directly under: Apply writes merged files directly under the Output Root, preserves their romfs folder structure, and leaves unrelated output files unchanged.
as a Trinity Mod Manager folder mod.
literals.as loose LayeredFS RomFS files for Trini: as loose LayeredFS RomFS files for Trinity Bypass.
literals.Bag Hook installs the shared AMX startup: Bag Hook installs the shared AMX startup hook required by Royal Candy and Starting Items. It grants nothing by itself; slot 1 is reserved for Royal Candy and slots 2-20 are reserved for Starting Items.
literals.Bag Hook must be installed before either: Bag Hook must be installed before either Royal Candy install workflow.
literals.Base RomFS and Base ExeFS must be siblin: Base RomFS and Base ExeFS must be sibling folders before creating an output root folder.
literals.Biome weights, height range, linked grou: Biome weights, height range, linked group spawn metadata, voice class, and outbreak weight from the S/V encounter row.
literals.Build a merge preview for the selected m: Build a merge preview for the selected matching RomFS files.
literals.Calculated from this slot's lot weight d: Calculated from this slot's lot weight divided by the selected condition row's total lot weight.
literals.Changes the item buy price used wherever: Changes the item buy price used wherever this item is sold.
literals.Choose No item for occupied Starting Ite: Choose No item for occupied Starting Items slots, then apply the staged slot update.
literals.Choose the first mod folder. The merger: Choose the first mod folder. The merger scans its RomFS files and ignores ExeFS content.
literals.Choose the second mod folder. Select the: Choose the second mod folder. Select the same relative file paths on both sides before staging.
literals.Combines compatible data-field changes a: Combines compatible data-field changes and asks when both mods changed the same value.
literals.Copy Pokemon, forms, percentages, and mi: Copy Pokemon, forms, percentages, and min/max levels from
literals.Copy this seed after Randomize or Apply: Copy this seed after Randomize or Apply Randomization Seed succeeds. It represents the generated output for the selected project data.
literals.Direct and mapped ownership getters retu: Direct and mapped ownership getters return unlocked.
literals.Each later story cap must be equal to or: Each later story cap must be equal to or higher than the cap before it.
literals.Exclude fixed-damage moves such as Sonic: Exclude fixed-damage moves such as Sonic Boom and Dragon Rage from randomized learnsets.
literals.Existing output files at the planned tar: Existing output files at the planned target paths may be replaced. Base RomFS and Base ExeFS are not modified.
literals.Expand randomized learnsets with fewer t: Expand randomized learnsets with fewer than 25 moves to 25 move slots spread from Lv. 1 to Lv. 75.
literals.Fashion ownership comes from the player: Fashion ownership comes from the player save.
literals.Fashion Unlock makes Sword/Shield fashio: Fashion Unlock makes Sword/Shield fashion ownership checks return unlocked at runtime, without importing a PKHeX save block.
literals.Folder creation is only available in the: Folder creation is only available in the desktop app.
literals.For single-slot type rerolls, allow the: For single-slot type rerolls, allow the selected type slot to match the other slot. When both type slots are selected, KM rolls mono-type versus dual-type shape separately.
literals.Gym scripts call the normal uniform-chan: Gym scripts call the normal uniform-change handler.
literals.Gym Uniform Removal keeps gym challenge: Gym Uniform Removal keeps gym challenge and gym leader battle scripts from switching the player into the gym uniform.
literals.Hyper Training edits the Battle Tower NP: Hyper Training edits the Battle Tower NPC script, the paired English NPC dialogue, and the party/box picker cutoff checks.
literals.Hyperspace Bypass makes Scarlet/Violet s: Hyperspace Bypass makes Scarlet/Violet skip the Hoopa species and form gate for Hyperspace Hole and Hyperspace Fury.
literals.In game, open a Pokemon Summary, move to: In game, open a Pokemon Summary, move to the stats graph page, then press X to toggle from normal stats to raw IV numbers. Press X again on that same page to return to the normal stats view.
literals.Include base Attack when base stats are: Include base Attack when base stats are randomized.
literals.Include base Defense when base stats are: Include base Defense when base stats are randomized.
literals.Include base HP when base stats are rand: Include base HP when base stats are randomized.
literals.Include base Special Attack when base st: Include base Special Attack when base stats are randomized.
literals.Include base Special Defense when base s: Include base Special Defense when base stats are randomized.
literals.Include base Speed when base stats are r: Include base Speed when base stats are randomized.
literals.Insert a normal line break inside the sa: Insert a normal line break inside the same message box.
literals.Insert the A-button continue prompt, cle: Insert the A-button continue prompt, clear the box, then continue on the next line.
literals.Insert the wait/scroll advance control,: Insert the wait/scroll advance control, then continue on the next line.
literals.Install the SwSh 60FPS ExeFS patch and g: Install the SwSh 60FPS ExeFS patch and generated ROMFS timing and animation overlays.
literals.IV Screen installs an independent Pokemo: IV Screen installs an independent Pokemon Summary hook for the stats graph and uses only its reserved exefs/main bytes.
literals.KM Editor will delete tracked Randomizer: KM Editor will delete tracked Randomizer-generated files from Output Root so those romfs/exefs files fall back to the base game. This can remove randomizer changes previously written to those files.
literals.KM Editor will read the pasted seed, sel: KM Editor will read the pasted seed, select the options stored inside it, and immediately write that exact randomized output to Output Root. Existing output files for those data domains may be replaced.
literals.KM Editor will scan local filesystem roo: KM Editor will scan local filesystem roots to find oo2core_8_win64.dll for S/V project data. This can take a while on large drives.
literals.KM Editor will write randomized output f: KM Editor will write randomized output files for the selected categories to Output Root. Existing output files for those data domains may be replaced.
literals.KM Editor will write the edited Scarlet/: KM Editor will write the edited Scarlet/Violet files under
literals.KM edits only the verified ownership get: KM edits only the verified ownership getter bytes in exefs/main; gender is not selected because the check result is forced after the save has already loaded.
literals.KM edits only the verified runtime gate: KM edits only the verified runtime gate branch in exefs/main; move data, learnsets, and personal data stay untouched.
literals.KM writes a build-ID IPS patch in exefs,: KM writes a build-ID IPS patch in exefs, so Eden/Yuzu applies the handler override at load time while the current outfit stays on.
Locked: full badges catch any level.
literals.Lot weights are relative inside the sele: Lot weights are relative inside the selected row
literals.Make sure each randomized learnset conta: Make sure each randomized learnset contains at least one damaging move when possible.
literals.Native update check was not available:: Native update check was not available:
literals.Navigating out of Shops before pressing: Navigating out of Shops before pressing Save Changes will permanently discard unsaved inventory edits in this editor.
No Fairy Gym boost mappings are loaded.
literals.No more than one immunity per type: No more than one immunity per type
No NPC item gifts are loaded.
literals.No oo2core_8_win64.dll was found. You ca: No oo2core_8_win64.dll was found. You can still choose the folder manually.
literals.oo2core_8_win64.dll folder was found and: oo2core_8_win64.dll folder was found and project paths were refreshed.
literals.Optional personal text mixed into new Ra: Optional personal text mixed into new Randomize rolls. This is limited to 20 characters and is included in generated shared seeds.
literals.Paste a shared KM1 seed here to apply th: Paste a shared KM1 seed here to apply that exact randomizer output to the current project. Legacy KMR1 seeds are still accepted.
literals.Prefer a same-type attack bonus move in: Prefer a same-type attack bonus move in the first learnset slot when one is available.
literals.Prevent randomized Type Chart values fro: Prevent randomized Type Chart values from creating immunities and replace vanilla immunities with non-immune effectiveness values.
literals.Randomize ability slot 1 for each Pokemo: Randomize ability slot 1 for each Pokemon.
literals.Randomize ability slot 2 for each Pokemo: Randomize ability slot 2 for each Pokemon.
literals.Randomize each Pokemon primary type. Whe: Randomize each Pokemon primary type. When both type slots are selected, KM can also change whether a Pokemon is mono-type or dual-type.
literals.Randomize each Pokemon secondary type. W: Randomize each Pokemon secondary type. When both type slots are selected, KM can also change whether a Pokemon is mono-type or dual-type.
literals.Randomize move tutor compatibility, incl: Randomize move tutor compatibility, including type tutors and Armor tutor moves.
literals.Randomize raid bonus rewards with safe i: Randomize raid bonus rewards with safe item candidates; Royal Candy item 1128 is excluded when Royal Candy is installed.
literals.Randomize raid drop rewards with safe it: Randomize raid drop rewards with safe item candidates; Royal Candy item 1128 is excluded when Royal Candy is installed.
literals.Randomize species/forms for fixed overwo: Randomize species/forms for fixed overworld or scripted static encounters.
literals.Randomize species/forms for Pokemon rece: Randomize species/forms for Pokemon received as gifts from scripts or event data.
literals.Randomize the hidden ability slot for ea: Randomize the hidden ability slot for each Pokemon.
literals.Randomize the Sword/Shield type-effectiv: Randomize the Sword/Shield type-effectiveness table in exefs/main.
literals.Randomize TM learn compatibility for eac: Randomize TM learn compatibility for each Pokemon.
literals.Randomize TR learn compatibility for eac: Randomize TR learn compatibility for each Pokemon.
literals.Randomize wild encounter Pokemon/form sl: Randomize wild encounter Pokemon/form slots and encounter percentages for symbol, hidden, fishing, shaking tree, and weather tables where they exist.
literals.Randomizes each Pokemon common, uncommon: Randomizes each Pokemon common, uncommon, and rare held item slots using safe item candidates.
literals.Randomizes evolution target species/form: Randomizes evolution target species/forms while keeping existing evolution methods, arguments, and levels.
literals.Randomizes Pokemon base stat values whil: Randomizes Pokemon base stat values while keeping values within safe personal-data limits.
literals.Randomizes Pokemon catch rates between 1: Randomizes Pokemon catch rates between 1 and 255 in personal data.
literals.Randomizes Pokemon level-up learnset mov: Randomizes Pokemon level-up learnset moves using legal, usable moves from the loaded move table.
literals.Randomizes Pokemon personal-data ability: Randomizes Pokemon personal-data ability slots using valid loaded ability IDs.
literals.Randomizes Pokemon personal-data types a: Randomizes Pokemon personal-data types and can change Pokemon between mono-type and dual-type when both type slots are selected.
literals.Randomizes whether each Pokemon can lear: Randomizes whether each Pokemon can learn TM, TR, and tutor moves.
literals.Records that are already Random are skip: Records that are already Random are skipped. This still uses the normal review and apply flow, so files are not written until you approve the change plan.
literals.Refresh 60FPS Patch status from Base Exe: Refresh 60FPS Patch status from Base ExeFS, Base RomFS, and Output Root.
literals.Removes Bag Hook plus dependent Royal Ca: Removes Bag Hook plus dependent Royal Candy and Starting Items output.
Removes the generated build-ID IPS file.
literals.Reset only clears Randomizer selections,: Reset only clears Randomizer selections, seed text, generated seed output, and replay state. It does not restore or delete files already written to Output Root.
literals.Restores only Fashion Unlock-owned bytes: Restores only Fashion Unlock-owned bytes and keeps other exefs/main edits.
literals.Restores only the Hyperspace Bypass-owne: Restores only the Hyperspace Bypass-owned instruction and keeps other exefs/main edits.
literals.Review the staged merge again after chan: Review the staged merge again after changing conflict choices.
literals.Royal Candy cannot be staged until Bag H: Royal Candy cannot be staged until Bag Hook V2 is installed.
literals.Royal Candy checks and planned outputs: Royal Candy checks and planned outputs
literals.Royal Candy requires Bag Hook and always: Royal Candy requires Bag Hook and always uses Bag Hook slot 1. Install workflows also patch reserved Royal Candy regions in exefs/main; use Remove Royal Candy to clear slot 1 and restore only Royal Candy-owned ExeFS bytes.
literals.Select every RomFS file in both mod dire: Select every RomFS file in both mod directories.
literals.Select Remove Royal Candy. Bag Hook and: Select Remove Royal Candy. Bag Hook and Starting Items stay installed; Catch Cap ExeFS bytes are preserved if present.
literals.Shuffle the selected base stat values wi: Shuffle the selected base stat values within each Pokemon instead of generating a fresh stat spread.
literals.Smart Merge found changes that touch the: Smart Merge found changes that touch the same value. Pick the source for each row, then Review; Apply stays locked until every row has a choice.
literals.so the output can be installed directly: so the output can be installed directly without Trinity Mod Manager.
literals.Sources apply top to bottom; lower enabl: Sources apply top to bottom; lower enabled sources win when smart merge falls back.
literals.Stage, review, and apply one NPC before: Stage, review, and apply one NPC before switching to another. This keeps each AMX script patch scoped to the item cells for that NPC and preserves other mods in the same files.
Starting Items can use slots 2-20 only.
literals.Starting Items cannot be staged until Ba: Starting Items cannot be staged until Bag Hook V2 is installed.
literals.Starting Items requires Bag Hook and use: Starting Items requires Bag Hook and uses only slots 2-20. Slot 1 is never used here because it is reserved for Royal Candy, and key item quantities are locked to 1.
literals.Take a screenshot of this message and re: Take a screenshot of this message and report it in GitHub Issues. Restart KM Editor before trying the same action again.
literals.The battle runtime rejects non-Hoopa and: The battle runtime rejects non-Hoopa and wrong-form users.
literals.The checked path branches to the existin: The checked path branches to the existing success return.
literals.The IPS patch makes the handler return s: The IPS patch makes the handler return success, and the outfit does not change.
literals.The search only fills the oo2core_8_win6: The search only fills the oo2core_8_win64.dll folder field when a match is found.
literals.This exact S/V condition row has one slo: This exact S/V condition row has one slot. Use the condition browser above to inspect adjacent rows for this location.
literals.This file search is only available in th: This file search is only available in the desktop app.
literals.This creates or replaces files under: This creates or replaces files under
literals.This will create or replace loose files: This will create or replace loose files under
literals.This will stage shiny lock edits for: This will stage shiny lock edits for
literals.This writes RomFS-relative files such as: This writes RomFS-relative files such as
literals.To remove Starting Items, set the occupi: To remove Starting Items, set the occupied Starting Items slots back to No item, then stage, review, and apply. Bag Hook and Royal Candy are not removed.
literals.Uninstalling Bag Hook removes dependent: Uninstalling Bag Hook removes dependent Royal Candy and Starting Items output. If Royal Candy also patched ExeFS, only Royal Candy-owned ExeFS bytes are restored and independent Catch Cap bytes are preserved.
literals.Use Stage Uninstall, then Review and App: Use Stage Uninstall, then Review and Apply. It restores only Catch Cap-owned ExeFS bytes, preserves Royal Candy when installed, and does not touch Bag Hook or Starting Items.
literals.When both mods changed the same selected: When both mods changed the same selected file, keeps Mod Directory 1 as the winner.
When both mods changed the same selected file, keeps Mod Directory 2 as the winner.
literals.Bridge responses must contain either pay: Bridge responses must contain either payload or error.
literals.Catch Cap Editor is independent from Bag: Catch Cap Editor is independent from Bag Hook, Royal Candy, and Starting Items. It edits only its reserved exefs/main hook bytes for badge levels 0-7 and patches both the trainer-card display path and the runtime capture gate. Eight badges is locked at Lv.100 because the game treats full badge completion as catch any level. Review before apply or uninstall; cleanup preserves Bag Hook, Royal Candy, and Starting Items when present.
Apply the merge directly to Output Root.
literals.Apply the pasted shared seed directly to: Apply the pasted shared seed directly to Output Root using its saved replay data.
literals.Copy the generated Randomizer Seed to th: Copy the generated Randomizer Seed to the system clipboard.
literals.Delete tracked Randomizer output files f: Delete tracked Randomizer output files from Output Root to restore vanilla/base game values for those data files.
literals.Eight badges is locked at Lv.100 because: Eight badges is locked at Lv.100 because full badges can catch any level.
literals.Forces random shiny checks to resolve as: Forces random shiny checks to resolve as shiny.
No gift shiny locks are currently set.
literals.No import category found for this previe: No import category found for this preview.
No static shiny locks are currently set.
No trade shiny locks are currently set.
literals.Not available yet. The current patch can: Not available yet. The current patch can make odds more common, but 1/8192 needs a separate shiny-threshold patch.
literals.Paste a shared seed and validate editabl: Paste a shared seed and validate editable project paths before applying it.
literals.Randomize or apply a shared seed before: Randomize or apply a shared seed before copying.
literals.Randomize the selected data and write it: Randomize the selected data and write it to Output Root.
literals.Remove only KM-owned 60FPS Patch output: Remove only KM-owned 60FPS Patch output while preserving other output files and non-overlapping exefs/main bytes.
literals.Restores the game's original shiny rerol: Restores the game's original shiny reroll logic.
